mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, toc_uid, nickname, mobile_encrypted, openid, unionid, vip_status, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM toc_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toc_user ( tenant_id, toc_uid, nickname, mobile_encrypted, openid, unionid, vip_status, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tocUid}, #{nickname}, #{mobileEncrypted}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{vipStatus}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE toc_user SET toc_uid = #{tocUid}, nickname = #{nickname}, mobile_encrypted = #{mobileEncrypted}, openid = #{openid}, unionid = #{unionid}, vip_status = #{vipStatus}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
